_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the structure and intent of USCYBERCOM and its subordinate organizations specific plans, orders, and standing rules of engagement.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data subject rights management, including rights request intake, fulfillment workflows, response timelines, and documentation requirements.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-005 (RC, cosine: 0.359), LS-K-004 (LS, cosine: 0.345).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.4/10 (raw 0.238). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [engagement, intent, orders, organizations, plans, rules] vs WIDAI-only terms [data, documentation, fulfillment, intake, management, request] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.859 (P=0.856, R=0.862). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Knowledge of the structure and intent of USCYBERCOM and its subordinate organiza" and "Knowledge of data subject rights management, including rights request intake, fu" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.369 > STS 0.238 (gap +0.131). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.3%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [engagement, intent, orders, organizations, plans, rules]. WIDAI-only: [data, documentation, fulfillment, intake, management, request].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.131 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
